name: io.github.verygoodplugins/robinhood-mcp
title: Robinhood Portfolio Research
description: Read-only research tools for Robinhood portfolio data

tools.name: robinhood_get_accounts
tools.description: List all accounts (brokerage + IRA) with account numbers and types

tools.name: robinhood_get_portfolio
tools.description: Get portfolio value and performance (supports account_number for IRA)

tools.name: robinhood_get_positions
tools.description: Get current stock holdings (supports account_number for IRA)

tools.name: robinhood_get_dividends
tools.description: Get dividend payment history (supports account_number for IRA)

tools.name: robinhood_get_crypto_quote
tools.description: Get real-time crypto price (BTC, ETH, etc.)
